schema.description: Video conferencing platform for scheduling, managing, and recording meetings and webinars.

tools.name: create_meeting
tools.description: Schedule a new Zoom meeting for a user.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the Zoom user who will host the meeting.

topic.description: The title or subject of the meeting.

start_time.description: The scheduled start time of the meeting in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-03-10T14:00:00Z).

duration.description: The planned duration of the meeting in minutes.

timezone.description: The timezone for the meeting start time (e.g., America/New_York).

password.description: Optional passcode required for participants to join the meeting.

meeting_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the created meeting.

join_url.description: The URL that participants use to join the meeting.

start_url.description: The URL that the host uses to start the meeting.

password.description: The passcode required for participants to join the meeting.

tools.name: get_meeting
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific meeting.

meeting_id.description: The unique identifier of the meeting to retrieve.
The unique identifier assigned to the created meeting.

topic.description: The title or subject of the meeting.

start_time.description: The scheduled start time of the meeting in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-03-10T14:00:00Z).

duration.description: The planned duration of the meeting in minutes.

join_url.description: The URL that participants use to join the meeting.

tools.name: list_meetings
tools.description: List all meetings for a specific user with optional filtering.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the Zoom user who will host the meeting.

type.description: Filter meetings by status: scheduled (future meetings), live (currently in progress), upcoming (next scheduled), or previous (past meetings).

page_size.description: The maximum number of meetings to return per page.

meetings.description: List of meetings matching the filter criteria.

meeting_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the created meeting.

topic.description: The title or subject of the meeting.

start_time.description: The scheduled start time of the meeting in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-03-10T14:00:00Z).

tools.name: update_meeting
tools.description: Modify the settings or details of an existing meeting.

meeting_id.description: The unique identifier of the meeting to retrieve.

topic.description: The title or subject of the meeting.

start_time.description: The scheduled start time of the meeting in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-03-10T14:00:00Z).

duration.description: The planned duration of the meeting in minutes.

success.description: Indicates whether the meeting was successfully updated.

tools.name: delete_meeting
tools.description: Delete or cancel a scheduled meeting.

meeting_id.description: The unique identifier of the meeting to retrieve.

occurrence_id.description: For recurring meetings, the specific occurrence instance to delete.

cancel_meeting_reminder.description: Whether to send cancellation notifications to registered participants.

success.description: Indicates whether the meeting was successfully deleted.

tools.name: list_recordings
tools.description: Retrieve cloud recordings for a user within a date range.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the Zoom user who will host the meeting.

from.description: The start date for the recording search range in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to.description: The end date for the recording search range in YYYY-MM-DD format.

page_size.description: The maximum number of recordings to return per page.

recordings.description: List of cloud recordings within the specified date range.

recording_id.description: The unique identifier of the recording.

meeting_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the created meeting.

topic.description: The title or subject of the meeting.

start_time.description: The scheduled start time of the meeting in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-03-10T14:00:00Z).

duration.description: The planned duration of the meeting in minutes.

tools.name: get_recording
tools.description: Retrieve recording files and download URLs for a specific meeting.

meeting_id.description: The unique identifier of the meeting to retrieve.

recording_files.description: List of recording files available for the meeting.

file_id.description: The unique identifier of the recording file.

file_type.description: The format of the recording file (e.g., MP4, M4A, TRANSCRIPT).

file_size.description: The size of the recording file in bytes.

play_url.description: The URL to stream or play the recording in a browser.

download_url.description: The URL to download the recording file.

tools.name: delete_recording
tools.description: Delete or move recording files to trash for a meeting.

meeting_id.description: The unique identifier of the meeting to retrieve.

action.description: The deletion action to perform: delete (permanently remove) or trash (move to trash for 30 days).

success.description: Indicates whether the recording was successfully deleted or moved to trash.

scenarios.description: Single meeting with minimal data, no recordings
Multiple meetings with varied attributes and one recording with files
Rich dataset with multiple meetings and recordings with diverse file types
Empty collections and edge cases - no meetings or recordings
